title: neltuma calderensis
intro: Neltuma calderensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae, commonly known as a type of palm tree. It is native to the tropical regions of South America, particularly in Colombia, where it is often found in humid forests and mountainous areas. The medicinal properties of Neltuma calderensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
